question_template: After the hypothetical motion, how many marked objects would actually be visible in the rendered camera image considering occlusion?
answer_rule: Apply egomotion; use rendering/depth/raycast visibility; count visible marked objects.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Reference template only. Adapt field names to your generator.
